# DREDOTT — Your Dot on the Red Sea

DREDOTT is an online marketplace for holiday stays, car rentals, and local services in Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt.

## What We Do

- **Stays**: Apartments, villas, chalets, studios, and penthouse rentals in Sharm El Sheikh. Direct booking from verified local owners — no hotel markups, no middlemen.
- **Cars**: Self-drive car rentals from verified local car owners. All vehicle types from economy to luxury SUVs. Prices in Egyptian Pounds (EGP).
- **Services**: Directory of local service providers — cleaning, maintenance, concierge, transport, and more.

## Location

Sharm El Sheikh, South Sinai Governorate, Egypt.
Covers all major areas: Naama Bay, Sharks Bay, Hadaba, Montazah, Nabq Bay, Um El Sid, El Salam, Old Market.

## Languages Supported

English (en), Arabic (ar), Russian (ru), Ukrainian (uk), German (de), Italian (it)

## Main URL

https://dredott.com

## Key Pages

- https://dredott.com/en — Home page (English)
- https://dredott.com/ar — Home page (Arabic, RTL)
- https://dredott.com/en/properties — Browse holiday apartments and villas
- https://dredott.com/en/cars — Browse cars for rent
- https://dredott.com/en/blog — Travel guides and tips about Sharm El Sheikh
- https://dredott.com/en/services — Local service providers

## Blog Topics

The DREDOTT blog covers:
- Best areas to stay in Sharm El Sheikh
- Car rental guides and tips
- Top activities and things to do
- Family holiday recommendations
- First-time visitor guides
- Seasonal travel advice

## Contact

WhatsApp is the primary contact method between guests and property/car owners.
Admin: Shady Abdelsalam (shady.abdulsalam@gmail.com)

## Currency

All prices listed in Egyptian Pounds (EGP).

## About the Platform

DREDOTT is a locally-operated platform built specifically for Sharm El Sheikh. It bridges the gap between international tourists and local property/car owners, enabling direct booking without resort markups. The platform is particularly useful for:
- Long-stay travellers (monthly rentals)
- Families needing space (apartments with kitchens)
- Groups who want private accommodation
- Budget travellers looking for better value than hotels

## Sitemap

https://dredott.com/sitemap.xml
